ddls:
CREATE TABLE "bonds" (
  "bond_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bond */,
  "isin" TEXT /* International Securities Identification Number (ISIN) of the bond */,
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Currency ID of the bond */,
  "coupon" REAL /* Coupon rate of the bond */,
  "maturity_date" TEXT /* Maturity date of the bond */,
  "issue_rating" TEXT /* Initial credit rating of the bond at issuance */,
  "issuer_id" INTEGER /* Issuer ID of the bond */,
  "bond_type" TEXT /* Type of the bond (e.g., government, corporate) */,
  "issue_date" TEXT /* Date the bond was issued */,
  "par_value" REAL /* Face value of the bond */,
  "last_rating_update" TEXT /* Date of the last rating update */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the bond (e.g., active, defaulted, matured) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bond_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bonds_issuer_id FOREIGN KEY ("issuer_id") REFERENCES issuers ("issuer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bonds_currency_id FOREIGN KEY ("currency_id") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "currencies" (
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each currency */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Three-letter code for the currency (e.g., EUR, USD) */,
  "currency_name" TEXT /* Full name of the currency */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol for the currency (e.g., €, $) */,
  "exchange_rate" REAL /* Exchange rate to a base currency (e.g., USD) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issuers" (
  "issuer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issuer */,
  "issuer_name" TEXT /* Name of the issuer */,
  "credit_rating" TEXT /* Current credit rating of the issuer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the issuer */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the issuer */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the issuer's official website */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the issuer */,
  "last_financial_update" TEXT /* Date of the last financial update */,
  "financial_health_score" INTEGER /* A score representing the financial health of the issuer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issuer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating agency */,
  "rating_agency" TEXT /* Name of the rating agency */,
  "rating_scale" TEXT /* Rating scale used by the agency */,
  "rating_description" TEXT /* Description of the rating scale */,
  "rating_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol used for the rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bond_ratings" (
  "bond_rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bond rating */,
  "bond_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bond being rated */,
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* ID of the rating agency */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was assigned */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating assigned by the agency */,
  "rating_agency_name" TEXT /* Name of the rating agency for better readability */,
  "rating_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the rating change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bond_rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bond_ratings_bond_id FOREIGN KEY ("bond_id") REFERENCES bonds ("bond_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bond_ratings_rating_id FOREIGN KEY ("rating_id") REFERENCES ratings ("rating_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bond_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "bond_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bond being priced */,
  "price_date" TEXT /* Date the price was recorded */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the bond on that date */,
  "price_source" TEXT /* Source of the price data */,
  "price_type" TEXT /* Type of price (e.g., bid, ask, last) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bond_prices_bond_id FOREIGN KEY ("bond_id") REFERENCES bonds ("bond_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bond_yields" (
  "yield_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each yield record */,
  "bond_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bond being yielded */,
  "yield_date" TEXT /* Date the yield was recorded */,
  "yield" REAL /* Yield of the bond on that date */,
  "yield_source" TEXT /* Source of the yield data */,
  "yield_type" TEXT /* Type of yield (e.g., current, yield-to-maturity) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("yield_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bond_yields_bond_id FOREIGN KEY ("bond_id") REFERENCES bonds ("bond_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_volumes" (
  "volume_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading volume record */,
  "bond_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bond being traded */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date the trade was recorded */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the bond on that date */,
  "volume_source" TEXT /* Source of the trading volume data */,
  "volume_type" TEXT /* Type of volume (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("volume_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_volumes_bond_id FOREIGN KEY ("bond_id") REFERENCES bonds ("bond_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the bond data */,
  "bond_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bond being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the bond data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string for the access request */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_bond_id FOREIGN KEY ("bond_id") REFERENCES bonds ("bond_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issuer_financials" (
  "issuer_financial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issuer financial record */,
  "issuer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issuer */,
  "financial_year" INTEGER /* Financial year */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue of the issuer for that year */,
  "net_income" REAL /* Net income of the issuer for that year */,
  "assets" REAL /* Total assets of the issuer */,
  "liabilities" REAL /* Total liabilities of the issuer */,
  "equity" REAL /* Shareholder equity of the issuer */,
  "debt_ratio" REAL /* Debt-to-equity ratio of the issuer */,
  "profit_margin" REAL /* Profit margin of the issuer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issuer_financial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issuer_financials_issuer_id FOREIGN KEY ("issuer_id") REFERENCES issuers ("issuer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bond_issuances" (
  "issuance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bond issuance */,
  "bond_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bond being issued */,
  "issuance_date" TEXT /* Date the bond was issued */,
  "issue_size" REAL /* Size of the bond issuance */,
  "issue_price" REAL /* Price of the bond at issuance */,
  "issuance_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the bond issuance */,
  "issuance_type" TEXT /* Type of issuance (e.g., public, private) */,
  "issuance_currency_id" INTEGER /* Currency ID of the issuance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issuance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bond_issuances_issuance_currency_id FOREIGN KEY ("issuance_currency_id") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bond_issuances_bond_id FOREIGN KEY ("bond_id") REFERENCES bonds ("bond_id")
)
